english: Allow payments up to 5000 rupees per day for groceries and fuel at any merchant, between 6am and 10pm.
Let me spend at most 1200 rupees on a single transaction for food delivery, only at Swiggy and Zomato, any time of day.
Permit up to 25000 rupees a month for travel and hotels at any merchant, but only during office hours, 9am to 6pm.
Approve transactions up to 800 rupees per transaction for pharmacy purchases at Apollo and MedPlus only, between 8am and 9pm.
Allow weekly spending up to 7000 rupees on entertainment and dining at any merchant, evenings only from 5pm to 11pm.
Cap daily fuel spending at 3000 rupees at HPCL and IndianOil stations, between 5am and 11pm.
Allow up to 15000 rupees per month for utilities and education at any merchant, any time.
Permit a maximum of 2000 rupees per transaction for online shopping at Amazon and Flipkart, between 10am and 8pm.
Let me spend up to 600 rupees a day on coffee and snacks at any merchant, mornings from 7am to noon.
Approve up to 50000 rupees a month for rent at NoBroker only, any time of day.
Allow weekly groceries up to 4500 rupees at BigBasket and DMart, between 8am and 10pm.
Permit single transactions up to 1500 rupees for ride-hailing on Uber and Ola, between 6am and midnight.
Cap monthly subscriptions at 1000 rupees for streaming and music at any merchant, any time.
Allow daily spending up to 3500 rupees on dining and groceries at any merchant, between 7am and 11pm.
